response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack/web engineer with strong software craftsmanship, but his background is almost entirely web, mobile, and application development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, PHP). The role requires SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in his experience. His closest relevant work (low-latency DLang services, brief C/C++ IDE tooling at National Instruments, a wave-field-synthesis thesis) is far from silicon-level performance architecture, and there is no deep-learning workload experience at all.
strengths: Strong systems fundamentals from low-latency, high-throughput DLang services handling millions of requests per second
Long, consistent engineering track record (15+ years) with testing discipline, TDD, and open-source contributions
Some exposure to C/C++ and hardware-adjacent work (LabWindows/CVI tooling, robotics, audio DSP thesis)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware performance-modeling experience whatsoever
No deep-learning training/inference or AI accelerator workload background required by the role
Career trajectory is senior web/full-stack IC, not principal-level hardware/performance architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware co-design experience
No AI/deep-learning workload or GPU architecture background
